data.en: My name is Amy.
data.cn: 我的名字是艾米。
data.hint: 介绍自己的姓名，最基础的主系表结构。
accept: My name is Amy.

data.en: I'd like to have a student ID card, please.
data.cn: 请给我办一张学生身份证。
data.hint: I would like to do sth. 想要做某事。
accept: I'd like to have a student ID card, please.

data.en: Hi, I'm Max Jackson.
data.cn: 嗨，我是马克斯·杰克逊。
data.hint: 日常口语中的自我介绍。
accept: Hi, I'm Max Jackson.

data.en: I'm an exchange student from the UK.
data.cn: 我是一名来自英国的交换生。
data.hint: exchange student意为交换生；UK前面要加the。
accept: I'm an exchange student from the UK.

data.en: Hello, everyone!
data.cn: 大家哈喽！
data.hint: 向大家打招呼。
accept: Hello, everyone!

data.en: Welcome to our school!
data.cn: 欢迎来到我们学校！
data.hint: Welcome to + 地点，欢迎来到某地。
accept: Welcome to our school!

data.en: Morning, Amy. How are you doing?
data.cn: 早上好，艾米。你最近怎么样？
data.hint: How are you doing是常用的问候语。
accept: Morning, Amy. How are you doing?

data.en: Very well, thank you.
data.cn: 非常好，谢谢你。
data.hint: 对问候的积极回复。
accept: Very well, thank you.

data.en: What about languages?
data.cn: 那语言类课程呢？
data.hint: What about...？ 用于征求意见或提问。
accept: What about languages?

data.en: Should I take French?
data.cn: 我应该选修法语吗？
data.hint: take a course 选修课程，should表示建议。
accept: Should I take French?

data.en: That's up to you.
data.cn: 那由你决定。
data.hint: It's up to sb. 意为由某人决定。
accept: That's up to you.

data.en: Good luck with your choices!
data.cn: 祝你的选择好运！
data.hint: Good luck with sth. 祝某事好运。
accept: Good luck with your choices!

data.en: Which courses did you pick?
data.cn: 你选了哪些课程？
data.hint: pick 意为挑选，选择课程。
accept: Which courses did you pick?

data.en: I chose biology, chemistry, maths and geography.
data.cn: 我选了生物、化学、数学和地理。
data.hint: chose是choose的过去式形式。
accept: I chose biology, chemistry, maths and geography.

data.en: I want to study medicine one day.
data.cn: 有朝一日我想学医。
data.hint: study medicine指学医，one day指有朝一日。
accept: I want to study medicine one day.

data.en: Do you like them?
data.cn: 你喜欢它们吗？
data.hint: 助动词do引导的疑问句。
accept: Do you like them?

data.en: I love biology best.
data.cn: 我最喜欢生物学。
data.hint: love ... best 意为最喜欢……
accept: I love biology best.

data.en: History is full of amazing stories.
data.cn: 历史充满了神奇的故事。
data.hint: be full of 意为充满。
accept: History is full of amazing stories.

data.en: Ready for the test?
data.cn: 准备好测试了吗？
data.hint: 省略了Are you的口语表达。
accept: Ready for the test?

data.en: Do you have any study tips for me?
data.cn: 你有什么学习窍门给我吗？
data.hint: study tips意为学习方法、窍门。
accept: Do you have any study tips for me?

data.en: So this is it—senior high school at last!
data.cn: 终于到了——高中生活终于开始了！
data.hint: at last 意为终于，最终。
accept: So this is it—senior high school at last!

data.en: I'm not outgoing so I'm a little anxious right now.
data.cn: 我不外向，所以现在有点焦虑。
data.hint: outgoing意为外向的，anxious意为焦虑的。
accept: I'm not outgoing so I'm a little anxious right now.

data.en: I want to make a good first impression.
data.cn: 我想留下一个好的第一印象。
data.hint: make an impression 留下印象。
accept: I want to make a good first impression.

data.en: Will I make any friends?
data.cn: 我会交到朋友吗？
data.hint: make friends 意为交朋友。
accept: Will I make any friends?

data.en: What if no one talks to me?
data.cn: 要是没人理我该怎么办？
data.hint: what if 意为如果……怎么办。
accept: What if no one talks to me?

data.en: I just had my first maths class at senior high school!
data.cn: 我刚刚上了高中的第一堂数学课！
data.hint: senior high school 高中。
accept: I just had my first maths class at senior high school!

data.en: The class was difficult, but the teacher was kind and friendly.
data.cn: 课很难，但是老师很和蔼友好。
data.hint: friendly虽然以ly结尾，但是是形容词。
accept: The class was difficult, but the teacher was kind and friendly.

data.en: He even told us a funny story, and everyone laughed so much!
data.cn: 他甚至给我们讲了个好笑的故事，大家都笑惨了！
data.hint: tell sb. a story 给某人讲故事。
accept: He even told us a funny story, and everyone laughed so much!

data.en: I found most of my classmates and teachers friendly and helpful.
data.cn: 我发现我的大多数同学 and teachers friendly and helpful.
data.hint: find +宾语+宾补结构。
accept: I found most of my classmates and teachers friendly and helpful.

data.en: This afternoon, we had our chemistry class in the science lab.
data.cn: 今天下午，我们在科学实验室上了化学课。
data.hint: science lab 科学实验室。
accept: This afternoon, we had our chemistry class in the science lab.

data.en: The lab is new and the lesson was great.
data.cn: 实验室是新的，这堂课也很棒。
data.hint: 简单的主系表并列句。
accept: The lab is new and the lesson was great.

data.en: I couldn't concentrate on the experiment.
data.cn: 我无法集中注意力做实验。
data.hint: concentrate on 意为专注于。
accept: I couldn't concentrate on the experiment.

data.en: I really wanted to tell him to please be quiet and leave me alone!
data.cn: 我真的想告诉他请安静一点，别打扰我！
data.hint: leave sb. alone 意为别打扰某人。
accept: I really wanted to tell him to please be quiet and leave me alone!

data.en: What a day!
data.cn: 多么充实的一天啊！
data.hint: 感叹句结构。
accept: What a day!

data.en: This morning, I was worried that no one would talk to me.
data.cn: 今天早上，我还担心没人理我呢。
data.hint: be worried that 担心……
accept: This morning, I was worried that no one would talk to me.

data.en: But I was wrong.
data.cn: 但我错了。
data.hint: Wrong表示错误的。
accept: But I was wrong.

data.en: I didn't feel awkward or frightened at all.
data.cn: 我一点也不觉得尴尬或害怕。
data.hint: not ... at all 意为一点也不。
accept: I didn't feel awkward or frightened at all.

data.en: I feel much more confident than I felt this morning.
data.cn: 我觉得比今天早上自信多了。
data.hint: much修饰比较级more confident。
accept: I feel much more confident than I felt this morning.

data.en: I think that tomorrow will be a great day!
data.cn: 我想明天会是美好的一天！
data.hint: 宾语从句结构。
accept: I think that tomorrow will be a great day!

data.en: Tian Hua is a new student at a school in America.
data.cn: 田华是美国一所学校的新学生。
data.hint: Tian Hua 专有名词。
accept: Tian Hua is a new student at a school in America.

data.en: I just listen to the teacher and take notes.
data.cn: 我就是听老师讲，并做笔记。
data.hint: take notes 意为做笔记。
accept: I just listen to the teacher and take notes.

data.en: Group work is my favourite way to learn.
data.cn: 小组合作是我最喜欢的学习方式。
data.hint: favourite 英式拼写，favourite way 最喜欢的方式。
accept: Group work is my favourite way to learn.

data.en: I like using flash cards.
data.cn: 我喜欢用教学闪卡。
data.hint: flash cards 识字卡片。
accept: I like using flash cards.

data.en: I make mind maps to organise my thoughts.
data.cn: 我画思维导图来整理我的思绪。
data.hint: organise 英式拼写，意为组织。
accept: I make mind maps to organise my thoughts.

data.en: I keep a learning diary, too.
data.cn: 我也记学习日记。
data.hint: learning diary 学习日记。
accept: I keep a learning diary, too.

data.en: I plan to become an engineer in the future.
data.cn: 我计划未来成为一名工程师。
data.hint: plan to do sth. 计划做某事。
accept: I plan to become an engineer in the future.

data.en: My dream is to start my own IT company!
data.cn: 我的梦想是创办自己的IT公司！
data.hint: start a company 创办公司。
accept: My dream is to start my own IT company!

data.en: The 100-year-old school lies in the centre of the city.
data.cn: 这所有着百年历史的学校位于市中心。
data.hint: lies in 位于，centre 英式拼写。
accept: The 100-year-old school lies in the centre of the city.

data.en: We had chemistry in the newly built lab.
data.cn: 我们在新建的实验室里上了化学课。
data.hint: newly built 新建的。
accept: We had chemistry in the newly built lab.

data.en: Studying and doing homework seem much more fun when you are at sea!
data.cn: 当你在海上时，学习和做功课似乎有趣得多！
data.hint: doing homework 动名词短语作主语。
accept: Studying and doing homework seem much more fun when you are at sea!
